name: dox402
description: Pay-per-use AI inference gateway using x402 payment protocol. No signup, no API key -- authenticate with your Ethereum wallet (SIWE), pay with USDC on Base Mainnet, and get streamed AI responses from 5 models.

authentication.instructions: 1. GET /auth/nonce?wallet=0xYOUR_ADDRESS to get a one-time nonce. 2. Construct an EIP-4361 (SIWE) message containing the nonce and sign it with personal_sign. 3. POST /auth/login with {message, signature} to receive a JWT session token (valid 24h). Alternative: pass a SIGN-IN-WITH-X header (base64-encoded SiwxPayload) on POST /infer for single-request auth without a separate login step.

skills.name: AI Inference
skills.description: Run AI text generation with conversation memory. Supports Llama 3.1 8B, Llama 3.3 70B, Gemma 3 12B, Mistral 7B, DeepSeek R1 32B. Returns SSE stream. Costs ~8-13 uUSDC per request depending on model and length.

skills.name: Deposit Credits
skills.description: Top up inference credit balance by submitting an on-chain USDC payment proof. Minimum 0.001 USDC (1000 uUSDC credits).

skills.name: Check Balance
skills.description: Query current credit balance in uUSDC, total deposited, total spent, and lifetime request count.

skills.name: Payment Information
skills.description: Get the USDC payment address, network (Base Mainnet), contract address, and minimum top-up amount. No authentication required.
